title: Knysna’s favourite market just got even fresher
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Food Lover’s Market Knysna has been nominated in numerous categories in the 2025 Readers’ Choice Awards, and we couldn’t be prouder!","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Food Lover’s Market Knysna has been nominated in numerous categories in the 2025 Readers’ Choice Awards, and we couldn’t be prouder!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you for showing us so much local love - from your weekly baskets to your votes, we’re here because of you.","html":"Thank you for showing us so much local love - from your weekly baskets to your votes, we’re here because of you."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Food Lover’s Market Knysna has been nominated in the following categories:"},{"type":"list","items":["Best Biltong","Best Sushi","Best Convenience Store","Best Fresh Produce Store","Best Supermarket","Best Water & Filtration"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After proudly serving Knysna for over 23 years, we’ve stepped into an exciting new chapter with a freshly revamped store that’s bigger, better, and bursting with flavour.","html":"After proudly serving Knysna for over 23 years, we’ve stepped into an exciting new chapter with a freshly revamped store that’s bigger, better, and bursting with flavour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With a massive 3 600m² of shopping space, you’ll find everything you need for a full, fresh and value-driven shopping experience - all under one roof, right here on the corner of Waterfront and Tide Street.","html":"With a massive 3 600m² of shopping space, you’ll find everything you need for a full, fresh and value-driven shopping experience - all under one roof, right here on the corner of Waterfront and Tide Street."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We’re especially proud of the recognition across departments, because every corner of our store has been designed with you in mind:","html":"We’re especially proud of the recognition across departments, because every corner of our store has been designed with you in mind:"},{"type":"list","items":["Our fruit and veg department is stacked high with the season’s best - fresh, colourful and great value.","At the butchery, you’ll meet Petra van Rooyen, a 25-year retail veteran who leads a team passionate about premium meat cuts and perfect braai packs.","The scratch bakery fills the air with the scent of warm bread, sweet treats and pastries made from scratch, daily.","Love seafood? Our fishmongers are on hand at the seafood counter to help you pick the perfect catch.","You’ll find crowd favourites like Smash Shack Burgers in our hot foods section, alongside an abundant cheese and deli island.","Need a quick bite? Grab sushi, biltong, salads or snacks from our Grab & Go and Fresh Society stations."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The heart of our store lies in the people behind it - co-owners Hermann Kapp and David Keyser, who bring more than 30 years of retail experience and real care for the Knysna community. Their passion and commitment are reflected in every upgrade - from wider aisles and digital screens to the 100 local jobs created through this revamp.","html":"The heart of our store lies in the people behind it - co-owners Hermann Kapp and David Keyser, who bring more than 30 years of retail experience and real care for the Knysna community. Their passion and commitment are reflected in every upgrade - from wider aisles and digital screens to the 100 local jobs created through this revamp."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“This is more than just a store to us,” says Hermann. “It’s a space we’ve built for our community - where families shop and foodies explore.”","html":"“This is more than just a store to us,” says Hermann. “It’s a space we’ve built for our community - where families shop and foodies explore.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We’re honoured to serve the Knysna community and even more excited to keep raising the bar. Come visit your award-winning store and experience the best in fresh, value and service - right here at Food Lover’s Market Knysna.","html":"We’re honoured to serve the Knysna community and even more excited to keep raising the bar. Come visit your award-winning store and experience the best in fresh, value and service - right here at Food Lover’s Market Knysna."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Thank you for nominating us in the Best of Knysna-Plett Readers' Choice Awards. Please vote for us on https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/knysna-plett/best-of-knysna-plett-vote/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Photo: Supplied","html":"Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
